name: sleeplessness
title: best herbal teas for sleeplessness
description: Paeonia lactiflora tea contains bioactive constituents such as alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are known to have sedative and calming effects to help treat sleeplessness. This herbal tea has a relaxing property, which helps to reduce stress and anxiety, promoting a good night's sleep.
